name: The Hollow Bough Tavern
description: A legendary tavern carved into the trunk of a massive hollow oak, where adventurers, druids, and fey creatures share drinks brewed from enchanted berries. The tavern is neutral ground by ancient pact — violence here invokes a terrible curse.

properties.specialty: Moonpetal Mead — induces vivid prophetic dreams
properties.notableFeature: A job board maintained by the Sylvan Council for quests and bounties
